# Odock.ai Full Index

Odock.ai is an open-source AI governance platform for LLM, MCP, and AI agent traffic.

Core product terms:
- AI governance platform
- AI gateway
- MCP gateway
- AI agent gateway
- LLM gateway
- AI compliance gateway
- EU AI Act readiness

Primary pages:
- https://www.odock.ai/
- https://www.odock.ai/mcp-gateway/
- https://www.odock.ai/enterprise/
- https://www.odock.ai/eu/
- https://www.odock.ai/blog/
- https://www.odock.ai/fr/
- https://www.odock.ai/fr/mcp-gateway/
- https://www.odock.ai/fr/enterprise/
- https://www.odock.ai/fr/eu/

Product summary:
- Govern model calls and MCP tool calls from one OpenAI-compatible gateway.
- Enforce virtual API keys, model access, MCP tool access, budgets, quotas, routing, and audit-ready usage records.
- Support security and governance workflows for AI agents before upstream model or tool execution.
- Help platform, security, and FinOps teams centralize AI control.
- Provide EU-oriented deployment and compliance positioning for teams working on EU AI Act readiness.

Key blog articles:
- https://www.odock.ai/blog/what-is-an-llm-gateway-and-why-ai-teams-need-one/
- https://www.odock.ai/blog/mcp-server-governance-for-ai-agents/
- https://www.odock.ai/blog/how-to-design-multi-provider-llm-routing-and-failover/
- https://www.odock.ai/blog/how-to-control-llm-costs-with-virtual-api-keys-budgets-and-quotas/
- https://www.odock.ai/blog/prompt-injection-data-leakage-and-llm-security-guardrails/
- https://www.odock.ai/blog/what-to-log-monitor-and-trace-in-production-llm-apps/

Canonical site:
- https://www.odock.ai/
